source_reviews.notes: The reopened Census page supports official NAICS classification context, but it does not report the selected-archetype firm counts 1,057, 1,551, or 1,973 and therefore does not support the registered low/base/high endpoints.

The reopened metadata page confirms that the dataset reports establishment product-line counts and revenue; the packet correctly does not use it as target-company accounting or a score-driving primitive.

The reopened SUSB page confirms annual paid-employee firm and establishment statistics by industry and enterprise size, but it does not report or derive the normalized 3,524-firm EBITDA-band denominator and therefore cannot support any registered coverage endpoint.

input_reviews.notes: The point range 3,524 is unchanged from the frozen dataset and candidly remains an ESTIMATE/NONE assumption; it is not treated as empirically established.
All bounds are null and MISSING, with the required accrual-recognized-revenue and trailing-twelve-month basis; no industry statistic is substituted for target accounting.
The GROSS_OF_ALL basis matches recognized revenue, the empty partitions exactly cover the empty pass-through list, and MISSING evidence is not represented as proof of zero pass-through.
The 2.5/4.0/5.5 million range is the unchanged bounded source-free frozen assumption and is explicitly not a target observation.
The 0.25/0.75/1.75 million range is the unchanged bounded source-free frozen assumption and remains distinct from employee cost and pass-through.
The assumption-mode basis is unchanged, source-free, rejects the broad dataset role mix, uses distinct cash-cost IDs, and the six role weights sum exactly to one.
Architecture/design removability 0.02/0.12/0.25 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Implementation/integration removability 0.05/0.18/0.35 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Project/quality removability 0.00/0.10/0.22 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Support/training removability 0.00/0.10/0.25 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Sales/account removability 0.00/0.08/0.18 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Corporate-operations removability 0.00/0.08/0.18 is an unchanged bounded ASSUMPTION/NONE primitive.
Year-one realization is honestly MISSING at every bound and remains separate from investment and commercial retention.
Year-two realization is honestly MISSING at every bound and remains separate from investment and commercial retention.
Year-three realization is honestly MISSING at every bound and remains separate from investment and commercial retention.
Year-four realization is honestly MISSING at every bound and remains separate from investment and commercial retention.
Year-five realization is honestly MISSING at every bound and remains separate from investment and commercial retention.
Up-front investment is honestly MISSING; no negative cost or implicit up-front-loss substitution is authored.
Year-one investment is honestly MISSING and separate from realization and retention.
Year-two investment is honestly MISSING and separate from realization and retention.
Year-three investment is honestly MISSING and separate from realization and retention.
Year-four investment is honestly MISSING and separate from realization and retention.
Year-five investment is honestly MISSING and separate from realization and retention.
Year-one retention is honestly MISSING and excludes implementation, survival, and valuation effects.
Year-two retention is honestly MISSING and excludes implementation, survival, and valuation effects.
Year-three retention is honestly MISSING and excludes implementation, survival, and valuation effects.
Year-four retention is honestly MISSING and excludes implementation, survival, and valuation effects.
Year-five retention is honestly MISSING and excludes implementation, survival, and valuation effects.

The ratios are arithmetically correct against the frozen counts, but S1 and S3 do not evidence the selected-archetype count endpoints or the normalized target-band denominator; DIRECT/MED and endpoint-support claims are therefore unsupported.
Availability is honestly MISSING for the exact archetype, geography, band, and five-year horizon and is not conflated with buyer access or capacity.
Access/win is honestly MISSING and remains conditional on availability and distinct from paid price.
The MISSING primitive retains exact DEAL_EXECUTION type, closed horizon, maximum non-duplicative count calculation, buyer, geography, archetype, and completion/onboarding scope.
The MISSING primitive retains exact INTEGRATION_ONBOARDING type, closed horizon, maximum non-duplicative count calculation, buyer, geography, archetype, and completion/onboarding scope.
Paid entry multiple is honestly MISSING and remains in P rather than B.
The six-dimension entry-equivalent state and digest are honestly MISSING, with one-state and no-sponsor-transformation policies preserved.
The downside multiple is honestly MISSING because the state and anchor are missing; its anchor channel and closed exclusion map do not duplicate C, survival, or operating effects.

The fixed-base Laspeyres survival basket is honestly MISSING with no services, while preserving the exact constant-price, constant-quality, exhaustive-baseline, no-new-demand, and R_cva-bound assertions.

findings.explanation: The critical target-archetype-coverage primitive is labeled DIRECT/MED with low/base/high endpoint support, but reopened S1 supplies only NAICS classification context and reopened S3 supplies only a general SUSB program description. Neither source reports or derives the 1,057/1,551/1,973 selected-archetype firm counts or the 3,524 normalized EBITDA-band denominator.
findings.causal_effect: The unsupported DIRECT designation overstates the evidence for the only empirically labeled score-driving range. Although readiness remains UNPROVEN and the decision remains indeterminate, the critical-input evidence check is false and publication must fail.
findings.remediation: At inputs.target_archetype_coverage, replace S1/S3 and each endpoint_support set with sources that directly support the exact target-archetype numerator and target-band denominator for low, base, and high, or downgrade the primitive to an honest non-DIRECT evidence state with the required bridge or source-free assumption semantics. Preserve the frozen arithmetic and UNPROVEN readiness.

summary: Reject. Schemas, identities, digests, deterministic record/memo reproduction, arithmetic, separations, missing-value treatment, readiness, h handling, and gates are valid. Publication fails because inputs.target_archetype_coverage claims DIRECT/MED endpoint support from S1 and S3 even though those sources provide only generic classification/program context and do not support the registered numerator or denominator endpoints.
